title: Automated Workstations
description: Adds vanilla-themed automatic workstations similar to the crafter. Currently adds an automatic smithing table.
body:
![Automated Workstation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45aef7e5b8392ba88c601d3e956aabe709a0638d_0.webp)

Adds vanilla-themed automatic workstations similar to the crafter.

## Smither

*   An automatic smithing table.
*   All input slots can be separately disabled.
*   Outputs a comparator signal of 1 for every input slot that has an item in it or is disabled.
*   When it receives a redstone signal it ejects the result obtained from the input slots. By placing another container block in front of it will make it eject the result into that container.
*   Items can be put in it with blocks like a hopper, dropper, crafter, another smither, etc.

**Rest of the workstations are being worked upon.**

[![Kinetic Hosting (Official Partner) - Use Code AMRONOS](https://i.imgur.com/ddEBPlA.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=757)
